title: Can't init or start VM, podman can't open podman-machine-default.lock: operation not permitted
body:
### Issue Description

I upgrade podman to the latest (5.1.1) by brew, and since I can't initiating VM with `podman machine init`, I got this error : 
```
$ podman machine init --log-level=trace
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level trace
DEBU[0000] Using Podman machine with `applehv` virtualization provider
DEBU[0000] socket length for /Users/MyUser/.config/containers/podman/machine/applehv is 71
DEBU[0000] socket length for /Users/MyUser/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/applehv is 76
DEBU[0000] socket length for /Users/MyUser/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/applehv/cache is 82
DEBU[0000] socket length for /var/folders/2m/_tl_8rf555x27qmjnqn9tvp00000gp/T/podman is 55
DEBU[0000] socket length for /Users/MyUser/.config/containers/podman/machine/applehv is 71
DEBU[0000] socket length for /Users/MyUser/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/applehv is 76
DEBU[0000] socket length for /Users/MyUser/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/applehv/cache is 82
DEBU[0000] socket length for /var/folders/2m/_tl_8rf555x27qmjnqn9tvp00000gp/T/podman is 55                                                                                                                                                                                                             
panic: open /Users/MyUser/.config/containers/podman/machine/applehv/podman-machine-default.lock: operation not permitted

goroutine 1 [running]:
github.com/containers/storage/pkg/lockfile.(*LockFile).lock(0x1400009ab40, 0x1)
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/vendor/github.com/containers/storage/pkg/lockfile/lockfile.go:411 +0x1b0
github.com/containers/storage/pkg/lockfile.(*LockFile).Lock(...)
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/vendor/github.com/containers/storage/pkg/lockfile/lockfile.go:132
github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/machine/shim.Init({0x4, 0x64, {0x0, 0x0}, {0x10359d598, 0x0}, {0x1400013cf00, 0x3, 0x3}, {0x0, ...}, ...}, ...)
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/pkg/machine/shim/host.go:99 +0x18c
github.com/containers/podman/v5/cmd/podman/machine.initMachine(0x104278480, {0x104315a40, 0x0, 0x0})
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/cmd/podman/machine/init.go:211 +0x5d0
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).execute(0x104278480, {0x1400003a2c0, 0x0, 0x0})
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:983 +0x840
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteC(0x10426be20)
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1115 +0x344
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).Execute(...)
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1039
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteContext(...)
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1032
main.Execute()
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/cmd/podman/root.go:115 +0xc8
main.main()
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/cmd/podman/main.go:61 +0x4b0
```

I set the files and directories right to 777 with `chmod 777 -R /Users/MyUser/.config/containers/podman/machine/applehv/podman-machine-default.lock`, and do again `podman machine init` but I got the same error.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Upgrade podman to 5.1.1 with `brew upgrade`
2. `podman machine init`

### Describe the results you received


```
$ podman machine init --log-level=trace
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level trace
DEBU[0000] Using Podman machine with `applehv` virtualization provider
DEBU[0000] socket length for /Users/MyUser/.config/containers/podman/machine/applehv is 71
DEBU[0000] socket length for /Users/MyUser/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/applehv is 76
DEBU[0000] socket length for /Users/MyUser/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/applehv/cache is 82
DEBU[0000] socket length for /var/folders/2m/_tl_8rf555x27qmjnqn9tvp00000gp/T/podman is 55
DEBU[0000] socket length for /Users/MyUser/.config/containers/podman/machine/applehv is 71
DEBU[0000] socket length for /Users/MyUser/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/applehv is 76
DEBU[0000] socket length for /Users/MyUser/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/applehv/cache is 82
DEBU[0000] socket length for /var/folders/2m/_tl_8rf555x27qmjnqn9tvp00000gp/T/podman is 55                                                                                                                                                                                                             
panic: open /Users/MyUser/.config/containers/podman/machine/applehv/podman-machine-default.lock: operation not permitted

goroutine 1 [running]:
github.com/containers/storage/pkg/lockfile.(*LockFile).lock(0x1400009ab40, 0x1)
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/vendor/github.com/containers/storage/pkg/lockfile/lockfile.go:411 +0x1b0
github.com/containers/storage/pkg/lockfile.(*LockFile).Lock(...)
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/vendor/github.com/containers/storage/pkg/lockfile/lockfile.go:132
github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/machine/shim.Init({0x4, 0x64, {0x0, 0x0}, {0x10359d598, 0x0}, {0x1400013cf00, 0x3, 0x3}, {0x0, ...}, ...}, ...)
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/pkg/machine/shim/host.go:99 +0x18c
github.com/containers/podman/v5/cmd/podman/machine.initMachine(0x104278480, {0x104315a40, 0x0, 0x0})
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/cmd/podman/machine/init.go:211 +0x5d0
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).execute(0x104278480, {0x1400003a2c0, 0x0, 0x0})
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:983 +0x840
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteC(0x10426be20)
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1115 +0x344
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).Execute(...)
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1039
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteContext(...)
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1032
main.Execute()
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/cmd/podman/root.go:115 +0xc8
main.main()
	/private/tmp/podman-20240604-4863-6xq48o/cmd/podman/main.go:61 +0x4b0
```

### Describe the results you expected

podman machine init successfully

### podman info output

```yaml
MacOS : 14.5
Architecture : Apple M2

$ podman info
OS: darwin/arm64
provider: applehv
version: 5.1.1

Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM
Error: unable to connect to Podman socket: Get "http://d/v5.1.1/libpod/_ping": dial unix /var/folders/2m/_tl_8rf555x27qmjnqn9tvp00000gp/T/storage-run-502/podman/podman.sock: connect: no such file or directory
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Host is MacOS Sonoma (14.5)

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: Also instead of brew can you test with our installer: https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/tag/v5.1.1

> Did 5.1.0 work correctly?

Hi Luap, 
Yes it works correctly with 5.10



> Also instead of brew can you test with our installer: https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/tag/v5.1.1
I will try

> Also instead of brew can you test with our installer: https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/tag/v5.1.1

Same issue
@BaudouinDV Hmm, I'm unable to reproduce with podman 5.1.1. Could you try a `podman machine reset` and retry, and see if you still run into this issue?

> @BaudouinDV Hmm, I'm unable to reproduce with podman 5.1.1. Could you try a `podman machine reset` and retry, and see if you still run into this issue?

Hi @ashley-cui; I still have the issue, this is the log : 
```
$ podman machine reset 
Warning: this command will delete all existing Podman machines
and all of the configuration and data directories for Podman machines

The following machine(s) will be deleted:


Are you sure you want to continue? [y/N] y
Error: 2 errors occurred:
	* unlinkat /Users/MyUser/.config/containers/podman/machine/applehv/podman-machine-default.lock: operation not permitted
	* unlinkat /Users/MyUser/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/port-alloc.lck: operation not permitted
```
What are the file permissions on these lock files? Who is the owner?
Can you get them removed manually?
Definitely looks like a perms issue, if there's a way to manually or force remove those files, I think it should end up working?

> What are the file permissions on these lock files? Who is the owner?

The owner is MyUser (me).
I try to give 777 perms on `/Users/MyUser/.config/containers/podman/machine/applehv/` and `/Users/MyUser/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/` but still got the error.

> Definitely looks like a perms issue, if there's a way to manually or force remove those files, I think it should end up working?

I deleted `/Users/MyUser/.local/share/containers` and `/Users/MyUser/.config/`. Run `podman machine reset` and I have still the error....

```
$ podman machine reset                                                                                
Warning: this command will delete all existing Podman machines
and all of the configuration and data directories for Podman machines

The following machine(s) will be deleted:


Are you sure you want to continue? [y/N] y
Error: 2 errors occurred:
	* unlinkat /Users/MyUser/.config/containers/podman/machine/applehv: operation not permitted
	* unlinkat /Users/MyUser/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/applehv/cache: operation not permitted

$ ls -lia /Users/MyUser/.config/containers/podman/machine/applehv                       
total 0
79076950 drwxr-xr-x  2 MyUser  MyGroup  64  5 jui 17:52 .
79076949 drwxr-xr-x  3 MyUser  MyGroup  96  5 jui 17:52 ..

$ ls -lia /Users/MyUser/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/applehv/cache            
total 0
79076955 drwxr-xr-x  2 MyUser  MyGroup  64  5 jui 17:52 .
79076954 drwxr-xr-x  3 MyUser  MyGroup  96  5 jui 17:52 ..
```
I have reinstall 4.9.5 and got  the same error. The error is on my side. Sorry.
